scope: changes made after the currently imported dual certification evidence
reason: CDAC public prompts, gold testbench stimulus, and hidden checker were tightened from low-4-bit activity to sparse 10-bit code coverage. Binary DAC prompts, gold testbench stimulus, and hidden checker were tightened from an 8-sample subset to all 16 4-bit codes. Flash ADC mini-array was changed from final-code-only quantizer behavior to a public seven-comparator thermometer ladder plus encoder. Pipeline ADC MDAC stage was promoted as a new CT01 release addition with prompt, gold, and checker coverage pending fresh dual validation. CT02 window comparator/detector was changed from Schmitt/hysteresis semantics to true lower/upper-threshold window semantics, with updated public prompts, gold Verilog-A/testbench assets, bugfix badcase, and hidden checker. CT02 L2 single-ramp comparator offset measurement-flow was redesigned from an outp-only offset comparator into a measurement flow with public trip_v, offset_est, valid observables, updated public prompts, gold Verilog-A/testbench assets, and hidden checker. CT05 charge-pump abstraction was changed from signed vin/out accumulation to sampled UP/DN/vctrl pulse semantics, and CT05 PLL timing slice now requires late-window lock assertion in prompt/checker/gold behavior.
next_required_validation: Run the affected CDAC, Binary DAC, Flash ADC mini-array, and Pipeline ADC stage forms through EVAS after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the same affected forms through Spectre after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the affected CT02 window comparator/detector forms through EVAS after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the same CT02 window comparator/detector forms through Spectre after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Refresh dual_certification.json, release_task.json certification fields, and paper claim reports only after both backends pass.
Run the affected CT02 L2 single-ramp comparator offset measurement-flow forms through EVAS after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the same CT02 L2 single-ramp comparator offset measurement-flow forms through Spectre after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the affected CT05 charge-pump abstraction and PLL timing-slice forms through EVAS after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
Run the same affected CT05 charge-pump abstraction and PLL timing-slice forms through Spectre after the broader prompt/checker audit batch is complete.
claim_boundary: The current CT05 charge-pump abstraction and PLL timing-slice dual evidence is pending because their public contracts, gold behavior, and hidden checkers now require UP/DN pulse semantics and late-window lock assertion.

The current CT02 L2 single-ramp comparator offset measurement-flow dual evidence is pending because the public contract and gold behavior now require trip_v, offset_est, and valid measurement observables.
The current CT02 window comparator/detector dual evidence is pending because the public contract and gold behavior changed from hysteresis to true window semantics.
The current dual_certification.json still reflects the previous imported run and should not be cited as fresh evidence for the sparse CDAC or all-code Binary DAC coverage changes.
Static schema, checksum, and checker unit tests are sufficient for this intermediate edit batch but not for final EVAS/Spectre certification.
